scripts.codegen: envio codegen && cd generated && pnpm install --shamefully-hoist --ignore-workspace && npx rescript build
scripts.status: docker exec envio-postgres psql -U postgres -d envio-dev -c "SELECT id as chain, progress_block, source_block, events_processed, ready_at FROM envio_chains ORDER BY id;"
scripts.spartakus:status: ssh ${ARAGON_DEPLOY_HOST:-spartakus} "pgrep -fa 'envio start' | head -3; docker ps --format '{{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}' | grep -E 'envio'"
scripts.spartakus:hasura: echo '→ Hasura console at http://localhost:9000 (admin-secret: testing) — Ctrl+C to disconnect' && ssh -N -L 9000:localhost:9000 ${ARAGON_DEPLOY_HOST:-spartakus}
